{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Silent King's bone
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The shaft of [[Lindon]]'s special arrows is made from the [[Silent King's bone]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5">''Waybound'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
